title: Kyros Returns to Human Form
description: Pages 6–10 focus on kyros returns to human form, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the restored humans throw the country into chaos as Kyros returns and Doflamingo's carefully controlled kingdom begins to collapse.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I ate the Pamu Pamu no mi... I'm a "Puncture- Man"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The things I can cause to burst are my own body...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: A piece of tin like you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...will be reduced to scrap in no time....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: explode into pieces and get out of my sight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: soldier!! Where are frankly and the others?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Straw Hat!! We don't have time to talk!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: No!! You have to run! There's no time!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: We have to make for the suit room on the second floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: That man is a very nasty one to deal with!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: You know I who I am?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I have been watching you all along, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I know all about your struggles these past ten years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Let us not speak of thanks just yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: There can be no greater suffering than that which you and King Riku have endured!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Not once since that day ten years ago have I considered myself one of you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: ...are an insult to the young master!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Hey!! It didn't hit you anywhere critical, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: I'm really sorry!! I shouldn't have let that hap- pen!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: At any rate, it's the second floor we've got to head for, right?!

summary: Kyros Returns to Human Form focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the restored humans throw the country into chaos as Kyros returns and Doflamingo's carefully controlled kingdom begins to collapse.
